_comment: Reproducibility gate policy for scripts/repro_gate.py. Declares this corpus's adapter and its reproducibility ratchet. See repro_gate.py for the verdict vocabulary.
_criterion_note: The 'space' adapter measures >= threshold contiguous token overlap against a fresh extraction, not byte equality, because each text.txt is the official text re-cut and re-wrapped (see extract.py). The stored bytes are separately hash-pinned. Moving this corpus to byte equality is tracked separately; until then 'reproduced' here is a weaker claim than in the other four corpora, honestly recorded per record as overlap_pct.
